summary: Verified bug fix (duplicate ₹ button removed) and role-based access control + user management. Backend endpoints all pass (payments, users, RBAC). Frontend Users page renders. However, the ₹ button in Bookings triggers a runtime error because the sendPaymentLink function is not defined in Bookings.jsx — the Razorpay payment link cannot be initiated from the UI.
passed: Admin login (admin@rcbevents.com/admin123) works; sidebar shows all 9 nav items including 'Users'
Bookings row actions column has exactly ONE ₹ button per row with correct order: view → pay-link → wa → invoice → edit → delete (duplicate fix confirmed)
POST /api/payments/create-link/{booking_id} with positive balance returns Razorpay short_url (rzp.io/rzp/...) and status 200; payment_link_id/url/status persisted to booking
POST /api/payments/create-link/{booking_id} with zero balance returns 400 'No balance due'
POST /api/users creates user with valid role (sales) → 200
/users page renders User Management UI with existing admin row + Add User button

failed.issue: Clicking the ₹ (Send Payment Link) button throws 'ReferenceError: sendPaymentLink is not defined'. The onClick calls sendPaymentLink(b) at line 246 but no such function is declared, imported, or defined anywhere in /app/frontend/src/pages/Bookings.jsx (grep confirms only one reference — the onClick). This blocks the entire Razorpay payment-link UI flow (no toast, no wa.me popup, no persisted payment_link_url via UI).
failed.evidence: Runtime overlay: 'Uncaught runtime errors: ERROR sendPaymentLink is not defined at onClick (bundle.js:2794:34)'. grep -n 'sendPaymentLink' Bookings.jsx returns only line 246.

action_items: Define/implement the sendPaymentLink(booking) function in /app/frontend/src/pages/Bookings.jsx: it should POST to `${API}/payments/create-link/${booking.id}`, on success show a 'Payment link created' toast and open a new tab to https://wa.me/91<mobile>?text=<encoded message with link.url>, on error show the API error message ('No balance due' etc.).

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (Users page + button layout OK; Razorpay UI flow broken)
